TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mark_Alarie, title = Mark_Alarie, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mark_Alarie} }

S.FORM: Mark Alarie sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, pzyang pkaki' tay kska', wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Mark Alarie, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Mark Alarie sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, pzyang pkaki' tay kska', wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Mark Alarie, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mark alarie s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, mark alarie, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
